title: Refactor: Introduce command pattern for actions
original_text: Refactored to use command pattern for user actions. Created command classes for all user operations. Implemented command invoker with undo/redo support. Added command history for audit trail. This makes actions reversible and testable. Added tests for command classes. Result: 41 tests pass.
expected_subject: refactor(pattern): introduce command pattern for actions
expected_body_lines: - Create command classes for all user operations
- Implement command invoker with undo/redo support
- Add command history for audit trail
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): introduce command pattern for actions"
